summary: Iteration 70: Verified PreviewTab.jsx lazy import fix for cross-file imports in multi-page sites. All 26 unit tests passed. The fix correctly implements: (1) __lazy function that defers component resolution to render time using React.forwardRef, (2) Local default/named imports use __lazy instead of direct window.__COMPONENTS__ lookup, (3) Unknown package imports generate __stubComponent calls, (4) Error boundary (_EBClass) wraps entry component render. The old broken eager resolution pattern is NOT present.

issues: Supabase auth lock warning in console - non-blocking, related to React Strict Mode (same as iteration_68 and iteration_69)

critical_code_review_comments: PreviewTab.jsx line 279: __lazy function defined with React.forwardRef for proper ref forwarding - VERIFIED

PreviewTab.jsx line 288: __lazy sets __isLazy = true marker for identification - VERIFIED
PreviewTab.jsx line 325: Local default imports use __lazy(localMod) instead of direct compRef - VERIFIED
PreviewTab.jsx line 328: Local named imports use __lazy(impN) for each imported name - VERIFIED
PreviewTab.jsx line 341: Unknown package imports generate __stubComponent calls - VERIFIED
PreviewTab.jsx line 238: __stubComponent function defined for unknown packages - VERIFIED
PreviewTab.jsx line 390: _EBClass error boundary defined with getDerivedStateFromError - VERIFIED

OLD BROKEN PATTERN NOT PRESENT: variableDeclarator(ls.local, compRef) - VERIFIED REMOVED

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login flow works correctly, dashboard loads with projects

context_for_next_testing_agent: The lazy import fix for PreviewTab.jsx is verified. The __lazy function correctly defers component resolution to render time, fixing the 'Element type is invalid' error when AI generates multi-page sites with cross-file imports. Key patterns verified: (1) __lazy uses React.forwardRef and looks up window.__COMPONENTS__[modName] inside the render function, (2) Local imports use __lazy wrapper instead of direct lookup, (3) Unknown packages get __stubComponent stubs, (4) Error boundary catches render errors. The old eager resolution pattern (compRef) is confirmed removed.

frontend_tests.login_flow: PASS - Login with REDACTED_LEAKED_USER works correctly
frontend_tests.dashboard_loads: PASS - Dashboard loads with multiple projects visible
frontend_tests.no_errors: PASS - No error messages on page

__lazy_function.code: function __lazy(modName) { var w = React.forwardRef(function(props, ref) { var C = window.__COMPONENTS__[modName] || window[modName]; ... }); w.__isLazy = true; w.__modName = modName; return w; }
__lazy_function.purpose: Defers component resolution to render time, fixing cross-file import order issues

unknown_package_stubs.purpose: Unknown package imports generate stub components

error_boundary.code: var _EBClass = (function(S) { ... EB.getDerivedStateFromError = function(e) { return { error: e }; }; ... })(React.Component);
error_boundary.purpose: Error boundary catches render errors in preview
